info.name: Chiper API - Complete Collection
info.description: Complete collection for testing all Chiper API endpoints including Inventory, Logistics, and Sales

request.description: Health check endpoint to verify API is running
Get all inventory items (supports query parameters)
Get all inventory items with query filters
Get a specific inventory item by ID
Get all purchase records (supports query parameters)
Get all purchase records with query filters
Get a specific purchase record by ID
Get all sale records (supports query parameters)
Get all sale records with query filters
Get a specific sale record by ID
Get available products for a store and zone using the current tendero endpoint path.
Get a specific catalogo by ID
Get a specific despacho by ID
Get a specific disponibilidad zona by ID
Get a specific nota credito by ID
Get a specific pedido by ID
Get a specific producto by ID
Get a specific promocion by ID
Get all external products (supports query parameters)
Get external products with query filters
Get a specific external product by ID
Create a new sale with items. Total is automatically calculated.
Get a specific sale by ID with all items
Update sale items (replaces all items, recalculates total)
Delete a sale (cascade deletes all items)
